runner.measurement: fresh child processes; Linux peak RSS from /usr/bin/time -f %M

cold.rationale: Phase Z source 6fa5079 CI run 29649631288 measured 23,315.693 ms and 24,568.744 ms on unchanged-head attempts. The frozen 30,000 ms ceiling retains 22.11% headroom over the worse attempt, above the observed 5.37% attempt variance.

incremental.rationale: Phase Y established the 125 ms hard bound. Phase Z source 6fa5079 CI run 29649631288 measured 110.350 ms and 111.538 ms on unchanged-head attempts; the frozen ceiling retains 12.07% headroom over the worse attempt, above the observed 1.08% variance.
